pkgmetadata.longdescription: Django-JSONEditorDjango-JSONEditor is an online structured JSON input widget for Django appropriate for various JSONFields provided for Django.Code of the javascript JSONEditor online editor has been got from the httpjsoneditoronline.org.See the latest versions of the javascript online JSON Editor here httpsgithub.comjosdejongjsoneditorSample views.. image httpsraw.github.comjosdejongjsoneditormastermiscjsoneditor.pngInstallation------------Latest version from the GIT repository pip install git+gitgithub.comnnsevadjango-jsoneditor.gitStable version from the PyPi repository pip install django-jsoneditorSee all details on httpsgithub.comnnsevadjango-jsoneditor
